Article Title: “They'll be back together”: Dak Prescott and Sarah Ramos could rekindle relationship before NFL season starts
Article Text:
Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly called off their planned wedding after allegations that the Dallas Cowboys star had been communicating with other women. However, Skip Bayless said the split was calm and mutual, while his wife Ernestine Sclafani predicted the couple could reunite before the next NFL season begins.

Skip Bayless’ wife predicts reconciliation despite breakup buzz

Dak Prescott Splitting From His Fiancée IS NFL's Free Agency Biggest News





Dak Prescott's personal life rumors have quickly become one of the most talked-about off-field stories about the Dallas Cowboys this offseason. When Prescott and his fiancée, Sarah Jane Ramos, called off their planned wedding in Italy, there was a lot of speculation about what went wrong behind the scenes. What was supposed to be a fun pre-wedding trip turned out to be tense, and the couple's relationship was suddenly in the public eye.The situation grew more complicated when allegations surfaced suggesting the quarterback may have been communicating with other women during the relationship. Neither Prescott nor Ramos has addressed the claims publicly. Still, the news triggered intense debate among fans and media figures.Yet amid the swirl of rumors and online speculation, one surprising voice close to veteran commentator Skip Bayless has offered a very different outlook about the couple’s future.Speaking on an episode of The Skip Bayless Show, Bayless shared information he said suggested the split between Prescott and Ramos may not have been as dramatic as many reports indicated. According to the longtime analyst, the separation was not fueled by a heated confrontation."I read they had no problem. There was no big blowout, and nothing happened. They just both decided it wasn't going to work. But they're going to co-parent."While Bayless described the situation as calm and mutual, his wife Ernestine Sclafani offered a far more optimistic prediction about what might come next. She suggested that the relationship might still have a future and hinted that the breakup could ultimately prove temporary."I think they'll get back together. I can't promise that, but I have a feeling... I'm telling you, by football time, they'll be back together, and they'll be married. That's my prediction"Her remarks quickly fueled fresh conversation among NFL fans who have been closely following the story. Sclafani believes that time away from the spotlight could allow the couple to regroup and rebuild their relationship before the next football season begins.For now, the reality remains unclear. Reports from Page Six claim Ramos had been aware of Prescott’s alleged behavior and hoped he would eventually change. The couple also share two young daughters, which adds another emotional layer to the situation.Whether reconciliation happens or not, the conversation surrounding Prescott’s personal life continues to evolve. As the Cowboys get ready for the 2026 season, the star quarterback's off-field story may be just as interesting as his on-field play.
Article Summary: Dak Prescott and fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly called off their planned wedding in Italy. Skip Bayless said the split was calm and mutual, while his wife Ernestine Sclafani predicted the couple could reunite before the next NFL season begins.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys firesale could push $16.68M two-time Pro Bowler into trade talks
Article Text:
The Dallas Cowboys’ busy 24 hours in free agency took another twist after the team traded two defensive linemen, signaling a possible roster reset. The surprising moves have sparked speculation that a two-time Pro Bowl offensive player could become a trade chip. With Dallas reshaping its roster and managing cap space, rival teams may start monitoring the situation closely.

Jake Ferguson emerges as a potential trade piece as Cowboys reshape roster





During the first wave of NFL free agency, the Dallas Cowboys have already changed their roster. The changes could have bigger effects than they thought. After parting ways with key defensive linemen Osa Odighizuwa and Solomon Thomas, the organization appears willing to make bold decisions across the roster. That sudden shift has sparked speculation around one offensive name that once looked untouchable: tight end Jake Ferguson.Dallas is entering a transitional moment. A new defensive coordinator in Christian Parker and offensive coordinator Klayton Adams are stepping into a team that is clearly rethinking its identity. In that kind of environment, even productive players can become trade assets. Ferguson, a two-time Pro Bowler who recently secured a long-term extension, suddenly sits in the middle of a conversation about value, cap flexibility, and the Cowboys’ evolving plans for 2026.The Cowboys’ decision to move on from defensive leaders caught many around the league by surprise. Odighizuwa had just received a long-term deal last offseason, yet Dallas still chose to pivot. That move signals a front office willing to reconsider nearly every contract on the books.Ferguson now finds himself in a curious position. The former fourth-round pick from the 2022 NFL Draft has steadily grown into one of Dallas’ most reliable offensive targets.He caught 82 passes for 600 yards in 2025, which shows that he was always a part of the passing game and not just having big games that made the news.There is also an interesting twist in his contract. Ferguson costs $10.4 million against the salary cap, which could be a factor as Dallas gets ready for the NFL Draft and looks at its financial priorities.Several teams could show interest if the Cowboys open the door to trade talks.The Kansas City Chiefs present one intriguing possibility. Veteran tight end Travis Kelce remains with the team for at least another season, but the franchise knows it must eventually prepare for life after its future Hall of Famer. Ferguson’s physical style and reliable hands could make him an ideal successor in Patrick Mahomes’ offense.Another team worth watching is the Pittsburgh Steelers. After releasing Jonnu Smith, Pittsburgh’s depth chart now relies heavily on Pat Freiermuth and Darnell Washington. Adding Ferguson would give the Steelers another dependable target and possibly reunite him with head coach Mike McCarthy’s offensive philosophy.The New York Jets also stand out as a potential landing spot. Veteran quarterback Geno Smith returned to the organization, and the team still seeks more consistency in its passing attack. Pairing Ferguson with young tight end Mason Taylor could give the Jets a balanced approach while strengthening red zone options.For now, Dallas has not signaled any immediate move. Yet after a surprising start to free agency, it is clear that the Cowboys are not afraid to make uncomfortable decisions. If the front office continues its roster reset, Jake Ferguson’s name may stay in trade discussions longer than anyone expected.
Article Summary: Dallas Cowboys traded defensive linemen Osa Odighizuwa and Solomon Thomas. The moves have sparked speculation that tight end Jake Ferguson could be a trade chip. Ferguson is a two-time Pro Bowler who recently signed a long-term extension. His contract costs $10.4 million against the salary cap.

Article Title: “Eroded a bit of trust”: Taylor Swift’s Travis Kelce wedding guest list drama sparks questions about Blake Lively friendship
Article Text:
Reports suggest tension between Taylor Swift and longtime friend Blake Lively after Swift’s name surfaced in Lively’s legal dispute with Justin Baldoni. Sources say the situation created an “emotional gap” and eroded trust. As Swift continues her high-profile relationship with Travis Kelce, the once-close friendship reportedly remains strained.

Reports suggest tension between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively





Wedding plans often bring joy, but they can also reopen complicated friendships. As anticipation builds around the upcoming marriage of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce , fresh reports suggest that one familiar name may not appear on the guest list. Actress Blake Lively , once considered part of Swift’s closest circle, is now rumored to be on uncertain ground with the pop star. The situation has drawn attention because Swift and Lively were frequently seen together in the past, often alongside Lively’s husband, Ryan Reynolds .The speculation comes at a time when Swift’s personal life is under intense public interest. Her engagement to Kelce has already sparked excitement among fans, and the wedding itself is expected to attract major celebrity attention. Yet behind the scenes, sources claim the singer may be reconsidering which friendships belong in that celebration. A developing legal dispute involving Lively and actor Justin Baldoni appears to have complicated matters even further.According to a report cited by insiders, Swift may be hesitant about inviting Lively to her upcoming wedding ceremony. One source explained that the singer feels “some hesitation” about adding Lively to the guest list. The concern is not simply personal. Insiders believe the decision also reflects how much attention the event is already expected to receive.Another detail from the report suggests Swift is worried the situation could overshadow the celebration itself.As one source noted, “It would likely trigger a media frenzy.” With global headlines already following Swift’s engagement to Kelce, any appearance tied to Lively’s ongoing legal drama could pull the spotlight away from the wedding.For a while, it looked like the two stars were good friends. People often saw Swift and Lively together at both private and public events. Their friendship grew to include family members as well, and Swift and Reynolds stayed friends. But it seems that things changed when Swift got indirectly involved in Lively's legal fight.The problem got worse when court documents about the fight with Baldoni showed private messages between Swift and Lively. Those revelations reportedly left Swift feeling uncomfortable about how her name entered the legal proceedings. According to sources, the experience created emotional distance between the longtime friends.One insider described the current situation by saying the relationship “is not what it once was” due to an “emotional gap that’s hard to ignore.” Another added that Swift has chosen to step back because “it has eroded a bit of trust between them.”For now, it remains unclear whether Lively will attend the wedding. Swift and Kelce are expected to marry this summer in Rhode Island, a ceremony likely to draw one of the most star filled guest lists in recent celebrity memory. Whether their once tight friendship recovers before that moment remains an open question.
Article Summary: Reports suggest tension between Taylor Swift and Blake Lively. Sources say the situation created an “emotional gap” and eroded trust. Swift and Lively were frequently seen together in the past, often alongside Lively’s husband, Ryan Reynolds.

Article Title: Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly gave Dak Prescott a cheating ultimatum before canceling their lavish Italy wedding amid shocking relationship turmoil
Article Text:
Sarah Jane Ramos and Dak Prescott (Getty Images)

Dak Prescott wedding called off after ultimatum from Sarah Jane Ramos over alleged infidelity





Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos saw their relationship unravel just weeks before what was meant to be a picturesque wedding in Italy. What had been planned as an intimate ceremony on the shores of Lake Como quietly fell apart in early March after tensions surfaced behind the scenes.Friends close to the couple say the decision came suddenly, but the issues had been simmering for months. Ramos, who shares two daughters with Prescott, reportedly confronted the Dallas Cowboys quarterback earlier this year over allegations that he had continued communicating with other women online. The situation eventually led to a difficult conversation and, ultimately, the cancellation of their wedding plans.According to reports first circulated by the TMZ, Ramos confronted Prescott in January after learning about alleged messages he had sent through incognito social media accounts. Sources told the New York Post and Us Weekly that the communications involved multiple women, including some former romantic interests.That confrontation reportedly came with an ultimatum. Ramos wanted the situation addressed before the couple moved forward with marriage.The pair had been together since May 2023 and became engaged just eight months later. Their relationship moved quickly, especially after welcoming their first daughter, Margaret, in February 2024. A second daughter, Aurora, followed in May 2025. Much of their life together appeared publicly joyful, with Ramos often sharing family photos and quiet moments from home on social media.Plans for the wedding were already in motion by early 2026. Invitations had gone out for an April 10 ceremony in Lake Como, a destination wedding many friends and family had already begun preparing to attend. The couple even traveled to the Bahamas in early March for a combined bachelor and bachelorette getaway with close friends.But it was during that trip, according to reports, that the situation reached a breaking point.On March 7, Ramos called off the wedding. Two days later, the couple sent a joint email to invited guests apologizing for the sudden cancellation. While speculation quickly spread online, Ramos addressed at least one rumor directly on Instagram, writing, “This had nothing to do with a prenup. I hope we can put that rumor to rest now.”A representative speaking to People emphasized that the breakup remains painful for both sides. “Both heartbroken that they’re not getting married,” the representative said. “There wasn’t any rockiness in the lead up, and there was no big argument or blow up. It was a mutual decision.”The statement also stressed that their focus now rests on family. “They love their girls, and they’re committed to raising their children together in the most loving and positive way,” Ramos' rep continued. “It’s still shocking for them since this happened so recently, and they ask for privacy while they sort everything out.”Prescott, now preparing for his 10th NFL season with the Cowboys following his massive 2024 contract extension, has not commented publicly on the allegations.Ramos, meanwhile, offered a small glimpse into her emotional state through a recent Instagram post from the Bahamas trip, writing, “I truly believe you can get through anything in life as long as you have really great friends. I love these girls so much ❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥.”For now, the wedding that once seemed set in stone has become another chapter quietly closed.
Article Summary: Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly confronted Dak Prescott over alleged infidelity. The couple had planned to wed in Lake Como, Italy, on April 10. Ramos and Prescott have two daughters together. A rep for Ramos said the couple is "heartbroken"

Article Title: “Ain't gonna have a baby”: Cardi B says pregnancy with baby tied to Stefon Diggs has been harder than expected
Article Text:
A viral video of Cardi B has sparked discussion online after she described painful pregnancy symptoms, saying the baby keeps kicking and makes it difficult for her to sleep. The clip, which some users linked to Stefon Diggs, quickly spread across social media, though it remains unclear whether the video is recent or taken from an older moment.

Viral clip shows Cardi B speaking candidly about pregnancy discomfort





Celebrity conversations often take unexpected turns online, especially when a short video clip begins circulating without clear context. That is exactly what happened recently with rapper Cardi B and NFL wide receiver Stefon Diggs . A TikTok clip shared widely across social media claims Cardi B opened up about the physical discomfort she has been experiencing during pregnancy. The short video quickly gained traction among fans, sparking debate about whether the footage is recent or pulled from an older moment.The viral post also fueled fresh curiosity about Cardi B’s relationship with Diggs. Neither of them has confirmed the timeline tied to the circulating clip, yet fans quickly connected the conversation to the ongoing buzz around the rapper’s personal life. As with many celebrity videos online, context remains uncertain.Still, the clip has drawn attention because it captures Cardi B speaking candidly about the challenges she faces while expecting a child.In the circulating video, Cardi B appears relaxed while talking openly about how pregnancy has affected her body. The short recording shows her describing how uncomfortable it has become to rest or sleep because of the baby’s movements. Her remarks sound raw and unfiltered, which is part of what made the clip spread quickly across social platforms.During the video, Cardi B says: "This is going to be the last baby in the next seven months. No, no, cause you're like this baby. So my back, so my pelvis is on my chest. How you on my chest and on my pelvis at the same time on my back got me fucked up. This is going to be the last baby in the next seven months."She added, "l ain't got to have a baby for a long time. I ain't got to have a baby for a long time. Baby just want to lay down. No, they don't want to lay down. Because when I start laying down, baby start kicking the shit out of me and it's not nice kicks, painful kicks, painful, painful shit. I can't even fucking sleep."Her description reflects a reality many expecting parents recognize. Pregnancy can bring joy, but it can also come with sleepless nights and constant discomfort.At the moment, there is no confirmation that the video was recorded recently or that it directly relates to Cardi B’s current situation. Viral posts often travel far beyond their original context. Even so, the clip has reignited online conversation about Cardi B’s life, her relationship with Diggs, and the intense spotlight that follows celebrity couples whenever personal moments surface online.
Article Summary: Viral clip shows Cardi B speaking candidly about pregnancy discomfort. The clip, which some users linked to Stefon Diggs, quickly spread across social media. It remains unclear whether the video is recent or taken from an older moment.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes spark buzz with $350,000 Kansas City Current decision
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes made headlines after their club, the Kansas City Current, approved a $350,000 transfer to acquire forward Penelope Hocking just days before the NWSL season opener. The move strengthens the team’s attack, while Brittany Mahomes is also set to receive United WE’s inaugural Champion for Change Award.

Kansas City Current make late roster move while Brittany Mahomes earns major recognition





The offseason in Kansas City has turned busy, but not just on the football field. While the Kansas City Chiefs reshape their roster for another title run, franchise quarterback Patrick Mahomes and his wife Brittany Mahomes are making headlines in a different arena. The power couple, already deeply invested in women’s soccer, have once again stepped into the spotlight with a major move involving their National Women’s Soccer League club.As co owners of the Kansas City Current, the Mahomes family continues to influence the club’s growth ahead of the new season. The Current made a bold $350,000 transfer just days before the 2026 campaign began to make their attack stronger. The move highlights the club’s aggressive ambition and reinforces the Mahomes family's commitment to building a championship level organization in Kansas City.The Kansas City Current surprised fans by announcing a late offseason trade for forward Penelope Hocking. The club confirmed the deal on March 11, sending $350,000 in intra league transfer funds to acquire the attacking talent.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.According to the team announcement, they “sent $350,000 in intra-league transfer funds in exchange for Hocking, who was Bay FC’s leading goal scorer last year.”The timing of the move caught attention because it arrived just days before the Current’s season opener against the Utah Royals.General manager Ryan Dell praised the signing and made it clear that the club believes Hocking can elevate the team’s offensive firepower. He said, “We are very excited to welcome Penelope to Kansas City. Penelope’s aptitude for scoring goals from anywhere on the field, combined with her ability to create chances for those around her, will only strengthen our attack. Above all, she is a great person and teammate who will positively impact our club on and off the pitch. ”Hocking also shared her excitement about joining the ambitious Kansas City organization. She said, “I’m extremely excited to be joining the Kansas City Current. This is a club with high expectations and high standards, and I’m excited to bring my energy, compete every day, and help the team win trophies.”While the roster move grabbed headlines, Brittany Mahomes is also being recognized for her growing impact on women’s sports. The national leadership organization United WE recently announced that she will receive the inaugural Champion for Change Award..The organization praised her influence in expanding opportunities for women’s sports, noting: “United WE is proud to announce Brittany Mahomes as the inaugural recipient of the Champion for Change Award at our Champions for Change event at CPKC Stadium.”.They added that “Brittany Mahomes will be honored for the lasting economic and cultural impact she has made in Kansas City and beyond through her leadership, entrepreneurship, and investment in women’s professional sports… Brittany has helped elevate women’s sports as both a cultural force and a growing economic engine — including through investment in the first stadium purpose-built for a women’s professional team. ”.Off the field, the Mahomes family continues to expand its legacy. Between Patrick Mahomes’ NFL dominance and Brittany Mahomes' growing leadership role in sports ownership, their influence in Kansas City keeps getting bigger.
Article Summary: Kansas City Current make late roster move while Brittany Mahomes earns major recognition. Patrick Mahomes and wife Brittany made headlines after their club, the Kansas City Current, approved a $350,000 transfer to acquire forward Penelope Hocking just days before the NWSL season opener. The move strengthens the team’s attack, while BrittanyMahomes is also set to receive United WE's inaugural Champion for Change Award.

Article Title: “Marrying a serial cheater”: Taylor Swift slammed in viral Joe Alwyn debate as Travis Kelce becomes part of fan war
Article Text:
A viral social media post praising Joe Alwyn while criticizing Taylor Swift sparked heated online debate. The comments quickly spread, drawing both backlash and support from fans. Although not directly involved, Swift’s fiancé Travis Kelce also entered the conversation as users compared Swift’s past relationship with Alwyn to her highly public romance with the NFL star.

Viral comments spark debate over Joe Alwyn and Taylor Swift





The fights involving celebrities can break out spontaneously in the realm of the internet, and the latest discussion of Taylor Swift demonstrates how quickly the social media can become heated. One of the latest posts comparing Swift to her former boyfriend Joe Alwyn made me consider their relationship once again. What began as a mere remark by a fan soon developed into a fierce debate with the two of us arguing over each other on issues of appearance to previous relationships.The conversation has also dragged Swift’s current fiancé, Travis Kelce , into the background narrative. While Kelce himself is not involved in the exchange, the timing of the viral posts has fueled renewed curiosity about Swift’s romantic timeline and the stark contrast between her past relationship with Alwyn and her very public future with the Kansas City Chiefs star. As usual, the internet has turned a few comments into a much bigger story.The discussion began when a Taylor Swift fan account posted a message praising Alwyn’s appearance while criticizing Swift. The tweet read: "joe alwyn looking hot god protected him from marrying a serial cheater who's aging like milk". The remark quickly spread across social platforms, drawing both support and backlash from fans.Soon after, another user responded with an equally blunt message: "he looks like a hot daddy, and the boring botox barbie is crying somewhere 💀".That response made an already active thread even more so, turning the conversation into a viral moment among fans and celebrity watchers.This shows how much fans still care about Swift's past relationships. Swift and Alwyn were together for a few years before breaking up quietly in 2023.Their relationship was famously private, unlike Swift's current relationship with Kelce, which has mostly been in the public eye.After months of intense media attention following their high-profile appearances together during the NFL season, Kelce and Swift got engaged. The tight end's easygoing nature and willingness to be in the spotlight made things different from Swift's last relationship.The viral comments have made people angry online, but they also show a pattern that is common in modern celebrity culture. Fans often use past relationships as a reason to fight. Social media loves to spread the word about every photo, interview, or past romance, which all become part of a bigger story.Taylor Swift seems to be focused on her future with Travis Kelce for now.But the internet's interest in her past shows that even old relationships can start new arguments overnight.
Article Summary: A viral social media post praising Joe Alwyn while criticizing Taylor Swift sparked heated online debate. The comments quickly spread, drawing both backlash and support from fans. Although not directly involved, Swift’s fiancé Travis Kelce also entered the conversation as users compared her past relationship with Alwyn to her highly public romance with the NFL star.

Article Title: Days after breakup with Anamaria Goltes, Lakers celebrate Luka Doncic’s pride as father of two daughters
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Luke Hales/ Getty Images

Amid split from Anamaria Goltes, Lakers give Luka Doncic a heartfelt shoutout for fatherhood



Luka Doncic revealed that he loves his daughters





For the complete match list, venues, and timings, check the full IPL 2026 schedule , fixtures, and team-wise match dates here.

Days after news surfaced about his separation from longtime partner Anamaria Goltes, the Los Angeles Lakers publicly celebrated Luka Doncic for his fatherhood. The moment came through a social media tribute that highlighted players across the organization who proudly embrace fatherhood.The message arrived during the team’s “Girl Dad Night,” a tribute honoring fathers raising daughters. The Lakers’ official account shared photos of Doncic with his two children, placing him alongside franchise icons like Kobe Bryant and LeBron James. The tribute came during a challenging period for the Slovenian guard, whose personal life has recently drawn attention following the end of his engagement.Lakers praise Luka Doncic’s devotion to his daughters following Anamaria Goltes split.The post read: “Shoutout to the Lakers family Girl Dads 💜 Happy Girl Dad Night ✨.”Reports earlier this week confirmed that Luka Doncic and Anamaria Goltes ended their engagement more than two years after announcing their plans to marry. The pair had known each other since childhood, after meeting in Croatia, and began dating in 2016. Doncic proposed in July 2023 in Slovenia during a private moment that the couple later shared online.Their relationship was kept largely private throughout the years. Goltes built her own career as a model and lifestyle influencer.Court records show that Goltes filed a legal petition in California requesting child support and attorney fees. Reports also indicate that she returned to Slovenia in May 2025, where their daughters currently live.Online speculation grew when Goltes removed photos featuring Doncic from her social media accounts.Doncic has spoken openly about his devotion to his children. The 27-year-old guard shares two daughters with Goltes. Their first child, Gabriela, was born in December 2023 in the United States while he played in Dallas. Their second daughter, Olivia, arrived in December in Slovenia after Doncic joined the Lakers.In a statement explaining the breakup, Doncic made clear that his focus remains on his family."I love my daughters more than anything and I've been doing everything I can for them to be with me in the U.S. during the season, but that hasn't been possible, so I recently made the tough decision to end my engagement," Doncic said. "Everything I do is for my daughters' happiness and I will always fight to be with them and give them the best life I can."The All-Star guard continues to balance the responsibilities of fatherhood with a demanding NBA schedule. In his first full season in Los Angeles, Doncic has delivered dominant numbers while the Lakers remain in the Western Conference playoff race.
Article Summary: Lakers praise Luka Doncic’s devotion to his daughters following Anamaria Goltes split. The 27-year-old guard shares two daughters with Goltes. Their first child, Gabriela, was born in December 2023 in the United States while he played in Dallas. Their second daughter, Olivia, arrived in December in Slovenia.
